methodology: See docs/bookkeeping.md 'Currency & inflation-adjustment conventions'. Base year 2015=100 for CPI index. FX rate = rials per US$. Pre-1979: official rate (Pahlavi era, official ~= market). 1979-2010: parallel/black-market rate -- Bahmani-Oskooee (2005) Table 4 monthly series (1979-2003) + annual anchors (2004-2010), see data/raw/iran-parallel-fx-1979-2010-research/manifest.json. 2011-present: parallel/black-market rate (TGJU daily). Never uses the official multi-tier rate for any period after 1979, even when official and parallel happened to converge (e.g. 2003-2010) -- the recorded figure is always an observed parallel/market rate, not an official-rate stand-in. CORRECTED 2026-07-13 for 2004/2007/2008: the prior 2004-2010 annual anchors rested on a Wikipedia transcription of CBI's 'Annual Review 2013/14' (one hop removed from the primary document). A follow-up round independently verified each year 2004-2010 against CBI's own daily-rate archive (cbi.ir/ExRates, retrieved via Wayback Machine) and IMF Article IV Consultation reports -- see data/raw/iran-cbi-imf-fx-verification-2004-2010/manifest.json for the full year-by-year evidence trail. 2005/2006/2009/2010 were CONFIRMED (within ~0.6% of the primary-sourced figures, unchanged). 2007 and 2008 were CONTRADICTED by a wide, well-corroborated margin (the old 2007 figure exceeded every daily rate CBI published that year; the old 2008 figure sat ~3% below the observed range) and have been corrected. 2004 has no CBI daily-rate archive available (earliest capture is Dec 2005) but converging secondary evidence (WDI/IMF-IFS official rate, an IMF fiscal-year calendar-blend, and Bahmani-Oskooee's own Aug-2004 spot observation) pointed the same direction, so it was corrected too, at moderate rather than high confidence.

fx_rate_source_by_year.2004: parallel/black-market == official (unified); CORRECTED 2026-07-13: WDI/IMF-IFS official-rate series + IMF Art.IV fiscal-year calendar-blend + Bahmani-Oskooee Aug-2004 spot observation (moderate confidence -- no CBI daily-rate archive reaches this far back; supersedes prior Wikipedia/CBI-Annual-Review-2013/14 transcription), see data/raw/iran-cbi-imf-fx-verification-2004-2010/manifest.json
fx_rate_source_by_year.2005: parallel/black-market == official (unified); CONFIRMED 2026-07-13 against CBI daily-rate archive (cbi.ir/ExRates via Wayback Machine) + IMF Art.IV fiscal-year data -- see data/raw/iran-cbi-imf-fx-verification-2004-2010/manifest.json (value unchanged)
fx_rate_source_by_year.2006: parallel/black-market == official (unified); CONFIRMED 2026-07-13 against CBI daily-rate archive (cbi.ir/ExRates via Wayback Machine) -- see data/raw/iran-cbi-imf-fx-verification-2004-2010/manifest.json (value unchanged)
fx_rate_source_by_year.2007: parallel/black-market == official (unified); CORRECTED 2026-07-13: CBI daily-rate archive (cbi.ir/ExRates via Wayback Machine, 9 dates spanning the full year) + IMF Art.IV FY2007/08 (triple-confirmed across 3 report vintages) + existing WDI/IMF-IFS official series all agree within 0.1% -- old value exceeded every daily rate CBI published in 2007; supersedes prior Wikipedia/CBI-Annual-Review-2013/14 transcription, see data/raw/iran-cbi-imf-fx-verification-2004-2010/manifest.json
fx_rate_source_by_year.2008: parallel/black-market == official (unified); CORRECTED 2026-07-13: CBI daily-rate archive (cbi.ir/ExRates via Wayback Machine, 12 dates spanning the full year) + existing WDI/IMF-IFS official series agree within 0.2% -- old value sat ~3% below the observed range and produced an anomalous negative official/parallel premium; supersedes prior Wikipedia/CBI-Annual-Review-2013/14 transcription, see data/raw/iran-cbi-imf-fx-verification-2004-2010/manifest.json
fx_rate_source_by_year.2009: parallel/black-market == official (unified); CONFIRMED 2026-07-13 against CBI daily-rate archive (cbi.ir/ExRates via Wayback Machine) -- see data/raw/iran-cbi-imf-fx-verification-2004-2010/manifest.json (value unchanged)
fx_rate_source_by_year.2010: parallel/black-market == official (unified); CONFIRMED 2026-07-13 against CBI daily-rate archive (cbi.ir/ExRates via Wayback Machine) -- see data/raw/iran-cbi-imf-fx-verification-2004-2010/manifest.json (value unchanged)

cpi_pre1960_note: 1937-1959 values are BACK-CHAINED from WDI's 2015-based index using Bank Melli/CBI YoY inflation rates, not a directly measured continuous index. Treat with wider uncertainty than the WDI-native 1960+ segment.
